kirundi.a_4_4_base_with_hollow_interior_wall_t: Urufatiro 4×4 rufite imbere irimwo ubusa — ubugari bw'urukuta 1. Bara gusa kibe z'urukuta.
kirundi.5_cube_plus_shape_1_layer_v_5: Ishusho yo kongeramwo iva mu kibe 5, urwego 1. V = 5.
kirundi.when_the_net_folds_up_completely_you_c: Iyo urusobe ruhinnye burundu, urabye purizimu. Ubuso ni ubuso bw'imbere zose 6 — impapuro zo gupfundikira.
kirundi.fold_the_net_up_and_you_get_the_prism_: Hina urusobe maze ubone purizimu. Ubuso ni ubuso bwose bw'imbere 6 — impapuro zo gupfundikira canke irangi uzakenera.
kirundi.volume_grows_as_the_cube_of_the_dimens: ingano yiyongera nka kibe y'ingano; ubuso bwiyongera nka kare. V imwe, ariko ubuso butandukanye cane.
kirundi.it_is_why_elephants_need_thick_legs_vo: Ni yo mpamvu inzovu zikeneye amaguru manini (ingano → uburemere bwiyongera vuba kurusha igice c'igufa),
kirundi.why_cells_stay_small_need_surface_area: impamvu selire zibandanya kuba nto (zikeneye ubuso bwo kwakira intungamubiri), n'impamvu ubudahwema bw'ubushuhe bukora (ishusho ziruziruye zibika ubushuhe).
kirundi.tap_any_row_above_to_swap_the_3d_prism: 👆 Fyonda umurongo uwo ari wo wose hejuru kugira ngo uhindure purizimu ya 3D ibe iyo shusho — raba ingano imwe mu buryo butandukanye.
kirundi.reset_3d_view_rotation_and_zoom: Subiramwo kuzenguruka no kwaguka kw'igaragaza rya 3D
kirundi.slider_v_l_w_h_watch_it_grow: Slider — V = uburebure × ubugari × ubuhagarike, raba uko yiyongera
kirundi.sliders_snap_to_integer_dimensions_gre: Ba-slider bifatana n'ibipimo vyuzuye — vyiza ku igaragaza rya mbere: kwikuba kabiri buri ruhande vyikuba ingano incuro 8 (2³). Ubuso buguka nka 2²; ingano nka 2³. Itegeko rya kare-kibe risigura impamvu inzovu zifite amaguru manini n'impamvu imbeba nto zishobora kugwa nta gukomereka.
kirundi.l_blocks_hollow_shapes_irregular_prism: Udukoni twa L, ishusho zirimwo ubusa, purizimu zidasanzwe. Ingano = igiteranyo ca kibe utitaye ku miterere. CCSS 5.MD.5: huza ingano ya purizimu y'urukiramende ihagaze no kugwiza no kongeramwo (V = b×h canke nk'igiteranyo c'ingano z'ibice).
kirundi.word_problems_volume_in_the_real_world: Ibibazo vy'amagambo — ingano mu isi nyayo
kirundi.a_fish_tank_with_5_3_4_60_cubes_of_wat: Itanki ry'amafi rya 5×3×4 = kibe 60 z'amazi. Agasanduku k'ibiryo vya saa sita 4×3×2 = kibe 24 za sandwich. Buri kugwiza kw'ibipimo bitatu ni ikigega nyako gifite ubushobozi nyako. CCSS 5.MD.5b: kemura ibibazo vy'ingano vy'isi nyayo.
kirundi.pick_a_context_to_make_volume_real: 🌍 Toranya imiterere kugira ngo ingano ibe nyayo:
kirundi.the_rectangular_prism_above_shows_exac: 💡 Purizimu y'urukiramende iri hejuru yerekana neza ico amagambo asigura. Ingano ni umubare wa kibe z'igipimo zikwira imbere.
kirundi.adjust_the_sliders_below_to_match_the_: Hindura ba-slider hepfo kugira ngo bihuze n'inkuru — canke gerageza imiterere nshasha. Kemura ibibazo 5 kugira ngo ubone 📝 Umurozi w'Amagambo. Sura imiterere 8 yose kugira 🌍 Umushakashatsi w'Isi Nyayo.
kirundi.click_grid_to_place_cubes_click_cube_t: 👉 Fyonda urusobe kugira ushireho kibe • Fyonda kibe kugira uyikureho • Fyonda hejuru kugira utondeke
kirundi.interactive_3d_viewport_drag_swipe_or_: Idirisha rifatanya rya 3D. Kurura, sunika, canke koresha utubuto tw'imyambi kugira uzenguruke. Fyata canke +/- kugira ukuze. R kugira usubiremo igaragaza.
kirundi.visual_is_a_voxel_approximation_built_: ⚠ Igaragaza ni ikigereranyo ca voxel (cubatswe muri kibe z'igipimo). Formule
kirundi.slice_horizontally_to_see_the_area_tim: Ca mu buryo butambitse kugira urabe isano y'ubuso kuncuro ubujakuzimu
kirundi.square_units_volume_cross_section_area: ibipimo vya kare. Ingano = (ubuso bw'iciro riciye) × (ubujakuzimu) ni ishingiro ry'imibare y'integaral.
kirundi.hypothesis_how_do_you_build_intuition_: Iciyumviro: Wubaka ute ubushishozi bwo guhanura ingano?
kirundi.which_dimension_affects_volume_the_mos: Ni ikihe gipimo gihindura ingano cane?
kirundi.when_are_predictions_hardest_when_easi: Ni ryari guhanura bigora cane? Ni ryari vyoroshe cane?
kirundi.explain_how_each_dimension_contributes: Sigura uko buri gipimo gifasha ingano rusange.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Icitonderwa c'igishushanyo: igisubizo gitandukanye c'imimerere 3; nta manota y'ingano nyayo; nta guhishura — ku bushake.
kirundi.browse_named_structures_to_build: Raba imiterere ifite amazina yo kubaka
kirundi.buildable_challenges_pick_a_structure_: 📚 Imbogamizi zishobora kubakwa — toranya imiterere yo kugerageza
kirundi.click_a_name_to_set_it_as_your_target_: Fyonda izina kugira ngo urishire nk'intego yawe — kibe zizagaragara nk'imirongo y'igicucu. Huza ishusho, hanyuma Genzura.
kirundi.download_a_png_snapshot_of_the_current: Kuramwo ifoto PNG y'iyubakwa rya none
kirundi.nothing_saved_yet_build_something_and_: Nta kintu kirabikwa. Ubaka ikintu maze ufyonde 💾 Bika.
